choices.text: Sum of UTXOs you can spend. Bitcoin has no account balances — only Unspent Transaction Outputs. Spending = consume input UTXOs, create output UTXOs. Stateless; parallelizable.

questions.explanation: UTXO model: balance = sum of spendable outputs.

choices.text: Mnemonic phrase (BIP39): 12-24 words encode random entropy. Master seed → unlimited child addresses via BIP32 HD derivation. Backup mnemonic on metal plate; protect offline. Lose mnemonic = lose all funds forever.

questions.explanation: Mnemonic = root of all wallet addresses.
